name: J23 JC23 - Open-Back Inclinable Power Press
description: A versatile and reliable open-back inclinable power press series, ideal for a wide range of metal forming applications such as punching, blanking, bending, and shallow drawing operations. The robust cast iron frame ensures stability and performance, while the inclinable design facilitates efficient scrap removal.
